---
title: "10X-HUDECA-HYPO : ANALYSIS"
author: "Yvon Mbouamboua <yvon.mbouamboua@inserm.fr>"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
date: '`r format(Sys.Date())`'
---

## Goal

Data analysis.

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
root <- '/Users/yvon.mbouamboua/projects/singlecell/10x-hudeca-hypo'
outdir <- file.path(root, 'output', 'analysis')
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
shared_root <- normalizePath('~/projects/cellverse/R', winslash = '/', mustWork = FALSE)
load_r <- function(d) {
  if (dir.exists(d)) {
    fs <- sort(list.files(d, '\\.R$', full.names = TRUE))
    invisible(lapply(fs, sys.source, envir = .GlobalEnv))
  }
}
load_r(file.path(shared_root, 'helper'))
import_dir <- file.path(shared_root, 'import')
pkg <- file.path(import_dir, 'packages.R')
if (file.exists(pkg)) sys.source(pkg, envir = .GlobalEnv)
load_r(import_dir)

```

All functions used in this analysis can be found here: https://github.com/ymbouamboua/HuDeCa/blob/main/R/000-functions.R.


# Load integrated data

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=6}

obj = readRDS(file.path(root, "OD-utput/preprocessing/data/fh.rds"))
cellmap(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = T, label.size = 5, legend = F)

```


# Cluster gene markers

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=18}

DefaultAssay(obj) = "RNA"
sub <- genefilter(obj)
markers <- cellmarker(sub,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", only.pos = T, max.cells.per.ident = 1000, min.pct = 0.1)
rm(sub)
write.table(markers, file.path(outdir, "data/seurat_markers.tsv"), sep = "\t", row.names = F, quote = F)
obj@misc$seurat_markers <- markers
markers <- read.delim(file.path(outdir, "data/seurat_markers.tsv"))
top <- markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC)
#View(top)
celldot(fh, features = rev(top$gene), flip = T, group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 10) 

```


# Split cluster 8

```{r}

Idents(obj) = "seurat_clusters"
obj = FindSubCluster(obj, cluster = 8, graph.name = "integrated_snn", resolution = 0.1)
# Idents(obj) = "C8"
# obj = FindSubCluster(obj, cluster = 23, graph.name = "integrated_snn", resolution = 0.2)
cellmap(obj, group.by = "sub.cluster", label = T)

```



```{r}

markers <- c(
  "HMGA2", "HES1","VIM","ARHGAP28", # NE
  "LD-ES", # NP
  "POMC", # ARC
  "AQP4", "AGRP", "ALDH1L1", "AGT", # Astro
  "GAD1",     # GABA
  "SLC17A6",  # GLUT
  "POMC",     # POMC
  "KISS1",    # KISS1
  "SOX2",     # RGC
  "RAX",      # Tanycytes
  "FOXJ1",    # Ependymocytes
  "GFAP",     # Astrocytes
  "OD-LIG1",    # OPC
  "MBP",      # Oligodendrocytes
  "VWF",      # Endothelial
  "BMP5",     # VLMC
  "PDGFRB",   # Pericytes
  "PTPRC"     # Microglia
)

cellfeat(obj,features = markers, ncol = 5, axes = FALSE, merge.leg = TRUE)
cellvio(obj,features = markers, group.by = "seurat_clusters", stack = T)
celldot(obj,features = markers, group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 8)
cellvio(obj, features = c("SIM1","OD-TP","LD-ES","PDGFRA","OD-LIG1","MBP","MOG"), stack = T)
cellfeat(obj, features = c("PTPRC","VWF","PDGFRB","BMP5","POMC"))
cellfeat(obj, features = c("MUC16","TUBB3","COL23A1"))

celldot(obj,features = c("FOXJ1","TPPP3","PIFO","DNAH5","DYNC2H1","PCDH7"),
        group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 8) # Ependy

celldot(obj,features = c("PLLP","PDGFRA", "MBP","BCAS1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 8, style = "bw") # OLigo

celldot(obj,features = c("RAX","LD-R2F1","LD-R2F2","FABP7","SLC1A3", "VIM","SOX2","S100B","AQP4","SLCO1C1","DIO2","DIO3","FBLN1","CRYM","GPR50"),
        group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 8, style = "bw") # Tanycytes
  
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c("POMC", "GH1", "PRL", "TSHB", "LHB", "FSHB")) # Pituitary
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c("PTPRC","VWF","PDGFRB","BMP5","STMN2","ELAVL3","COL27A1", "ACAN","RSPO1","RSPO2", "WNT3A"),style = "bw", txtsize = 8)
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c("SOX2","SOX9","VIM","LD-ES","FABP7","HES1","HES5","ID1","ID2","ID3"), 
        txtsize = 8) # RGC

cellvio(obj, features = c("AQP4","AGT","RAX","SHH","LD-PY","AGRP"), stack = T, group.by = "sub.cluster", pt.size = 0.1)

```




```{r  fig.width=10, fig.height=8}

# Progenitors / Glia lineage
markers_NEP <- c("SOX2","OD-TX2","VIM","LD-ES","HES1","HMGA2","CDH2","LD-OTCH1")
markers_RGC <- c("SOX2","VIM","LD-ES","FABP7","GLI3","PAX6","HES5","SLC1A3")
markers_tRGC <- c("VIM","FABP7","SOX2","HOPX","TNC","LGALS3","ID3","COL27A1")
#markers_TSC <- c("RAX","VIM","LD-ES","COL23A1","FGF10","CRYM","LHX2")
markers_WNTRGC <- c("RSPO1","RSPO2","WNT3A","AXIN2","LEF1","LGR4","FZD7","SOX2")
markers_Epend <- c("FOXJ1","TPPP","PIFO","DNAH9","CFAP44","S100B","RFX3")

# Neuronal lineage
markers_NB <- c("DCX","TUBB3","LD-EUROD1","ASCL1","DLL3","SOX4","SOX11")
markers_tNB <- c("DCX","TUBB3","LD-EUROD2","STMN2","ELAVL4","ISL1")
markers_NKX6_2_NB <- c("LD-KX6-2","DCX","TUBB3","LD-EUROD1","ASCL1","OD-LIG2")
markers_NKX6_2_NB_ARC <- c("LD-KX6-2","RAX","LD-R5A1","DCX","OD-TP","SOX14")
markers_ARC <- c("RAX","OD-TP","LD-R5A1","POMC","GHRH","LD-PY","AGRP")
markers_PVN <- c("OD-TP","SIM1","POU3F2","OD-TX2","OD-XT","AVP","CRH")
markers_VMH <- c("LD-R5A1","FEZF1","LD-KX2-1","FOXD1","TAC1","ESR1")

hypo_markers <- list(
  NEP = markers_NEP,
  RGC = markers_RGC,
  tRGC = markers_tRGC,
  TSC = markers_TSC,
  WNT_RGC = markers_WNTRGC,
  Epend = markers_Epend,
  NB = markers_NB,
  tNB = markers_tNB,
  NKX6_2_NB = markers_NKX6_2_NB,
  NKX6_2_NB_ARC = markers_NKX6_2_NB_ARC,
  NKX6_2_NB_VMH = markers_NKX6_2_NB_VMH,
  ARC = markers_ARC,
  PVN = markers_PVN,
  VMH = markers_VMH
)

cellfeat(obj, features = markers_VMH, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_VMH, group.by = "seurat_clusters")
cellfeat(obj, features = markers_PVN, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_PVN, group.by = "seurat_clusters")
cellfeat(obj, features = markers_ARC, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_ARC, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

cellfeat(obj, features = markers_TSC, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_TSC, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

TSC = c("CCND2","HMGA2","HES1","SHH","GPC3","MEST","SLIT2","DBX1","WNT8B",
        "FOXB1","DKK2","LD-KX2-4","ETNA5","BARHL1") # Harmony et al
cellfeat(obj, features = TSC, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = TSC, group.by = "seurat_clusters", txtsize = 8)

cellfeat(obj, features = markers_NKX6_2_NB, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_NKX6_2_NB, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

cellfeat(obj, features = markers_NKX6_2_NB_ARC, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_NKX6_2_NB_ARC, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

cellfeat(obj, features = markers_NEP, axes = F)
celldot(obj, features = markers_NEP, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

celldot(obj, features = markers_WNTRGC, group.by = "seurat_clusters")

celldot(obj, features = "GAD2", style = "bw")
cellfeat(obj, features = c("GAD1","SLC32A1","SLC17A6"))


```


# Human fetal hypothalamus marker genes

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=10}

hypo_markers <- list(
  ## Neural progenitors / radial glia
  progenitors = c("SOX2", "LD-ES", "VIM", "HES1", "HES5","PAX6", "FABP7", "MKI67", "TOP2A"),
  ## Intermediate progenitors / neurogenic
  intermediate = c("ASCL1", "LD-EUROG2", "LD-EUROD1","DLL1", "HES6", "TBR2"),
  ## Early neurons (pan-neuronal)
  neurons_early = c("DCX", "STMN2", "TUBB3", "MAP2","ELAVL3", "ELAVL4"),
  ## Glutamatergic neurons
  glutamatergic = c("SLC17A6", "SLC17A7","VGLUT2", "TBR1", "LD-EUROD6"),
  ## GABAergic neurons
  gabaergic = c("GAD1", "GAD2", "SLC32A1","DLX1", "DLX2", "DLX5", "DLX6"),
  ## Hypothalamic neuropeptides (core identity)
  neuropeptides = c("POMC", "LD-PY", "AGRP", "CARTPT","OD-XT", "AVP", "CRH", "TRH","GHRH", "SST", "TAC1", "TAC3"),
  ## Arcuate nucleus (ARC)
  arcuate = c("POMC", "AGRP", "LD-PY","LEPR", "MC4R", "KISS1"),
  ## Ventromedial hypothalamus (VMH)
  vmh = c("LD-R5A1", "TBX3", "RORA","ESR1", "FEZF1"),
  ## Paraventricular nucleus (PVN)
  pvn = c("SIM1", "OD-TP", "CRH","AVP", "OD-XT", "PDYN"),
  ## Lateral hypothalamus (LH)
  lh = c("HCRT", "PMCH", "GAL","LD-RGN"),
  ## Astrocytes
  astrocytes = c("GFAP", "AQP4", "SLC1A3","ALDH1L1", "SOX9"),
  ## Tanycytes
  tanycytes = c("RAX","LD-R2F1","LD-R2F2","FABP7","SLC1A3", "VIM","SOX2","S100B","AQP4","SLCO1C1","DIO2","DIO3","FBLN1","CRYM","GPR50"),
  ## Oligodendrocyte lineage
  oligodendrocytes = c("OD-LIG1", "OD-LIG2", "SOX10","PDGFRA", "MBP"),
  ## Microglia (present early in fetal brain)
  microglia = c("CX3CR1", "P2RY12","AIF1", "TYROBP", "LST1")
)

celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c(hypo_markers$glutamatergic, hypo_markers$gabaergic,"TBX3","SIM1", "OD-TP"), style = "bw")
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c(hypo_markers$vmh), style = "bw")
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = unlist(hypo_markers), style = "bw")
celldot(obj, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = c(hypo_markers$glutamatergic, hypo_markers$gabaergic), style = "bw")
cellfeat(obj, features = c("TBX3","POMC","AGRP","KISS1","LD-PY"))
cellfeat(obj, c("SLC32A1","SLC17A6","TBR1"))

```




## ann1

```{r}

ann1_map <- list(RGC = c(4,11,18,34), 
                 Ependymal = c(15),
                 TSC = c(8), 
                 IPC = c(13), 
                 Myogenic = c(32),
                 Neuron = c(2,5,10,3,6,9,1,16,0,12,14,17,25,20,33,35,27,31,26,21),
  Oligodendrocyte = c(23), 
  NCC = c(28),
  Pituitary = c(19), 
  Vascular = c(22), 
  Mesenchyme = c(7,24,30,24),
  Immune  = c(29)
  )

obj$ann1 <- NA_character_
map1 <- make_cluster_map(ann1_map)
obj@meta.data$ann1 <- map1[as.character(obj$seurat_clusters)]

Idents(obj) = "sub.cluster"
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_3")
obj$ann1[tany] <- "Tanycyte"
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_1")
obj$ann1[tany] <- "Astrocyte"


ann1_order <- c(
  "RGC", "TSC", "IPC",
  "Ependymal", "Tanycyte", "Astrocyte", "OD-ligodendrocyte",
  "LD-euron",
  "Myogenic", "LD-CC", "Mesenchyme", "Vascular", "Immune","Pituitary"
)

obj$ann1 <- factor(obj$ann1, levels = ann1_order)

cellmap(obj, group.by = "ann1", label = T)

```


# ann2

```{r}

ann2_map <- list(RGC = c(4,11,18,34), 
                 Ependy = c(15),
                 TSC = c(8), 
                 IPC = c(13), 
                 Myog = c(32), 
                 Cartl = c(24), # ACAN, COL27A1
                 GLUT = c(2,5,10,21,26),
                 GABA = c(3,6,9,16,0,25,20,33,35,27,14),
                 ARC = c(1),
                 PVN = c(31),
                 VMH = c(12,17),
                 Oligo = c(23),
                 NCC = c(28),
                 Pit = c(19), 
                 VLMC = c(7,24), 
                 Peri = c(30), 
                 EC = c(22),
                 MG  = c(29)
)

obj$ann2 <- NA_character_
map2 <- make_cluster_map(ann2_map)
obj@meta.data$ann2 <- map2[as.character(obj$seurat_clusters)]

Idents(obj) = "sub.cluster"
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_3")
obj$ann2[tany] <- "Tany"
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_1")
obj$ann2[tany] <- "Astro"

ann2_order <- c(
  "RGC",
  "TSC",
  "IPC",
  "Ependy",
  "Tany",
  "Astro",
  "OD-ligo",
  "GLUT",
  "GABA",
  "ARC",
  "PVN",
  "VMH",
  "Myog",
  "Cartl",
  "LD-CC",
  "VLMC",
  "Peri",
  "EC",
  "MG",
  "Pit"
)

obj$ann2 <- factor(obj$ann2, levels = ann2_order)
cellmap(obj, group.by = "ann2", label = T)

```


```{r}
cellfeat(obj, features = c("TBX3","KISS1","POMC"), theme.cols = "magma")
```


# ann3

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=6}


ann3_map <- list(RGC1 = c(4), 
                 RGC2 = c(18), 
                 tRGC = c(11), # transitional RGC
                 dRGC = (34), # PAX7, CDH19 # dorsal hypo RGC
                 Ependy = c(15),
                 TSC = c(8), 
                 IPC = c(13), 
                 Myog = c(32), 
                 Cartl = c(24), # "ACAN", "COL27A1", "SOX9"
                 TBR1 = c(2,5,10),
                 RNF220 = c(21),
                 ERBB4 = c(9),
                 TBX20 = c(35),
                 VWC2L = c(0),
                 SYT10 = c(6),
                 SLC5A7 = c(14),
                 RELN = c(20),
                 GBX1 = c(16),
                 STRIP2 = c(3),
                 SIM1 = c(31),
                 TTC6 = c(27,33),
                 OTX2 = c(25),
                 ONECUT2 = c(17),
                 `NKX2-1` = c(12), # "LD-R5A1","FEZF1","LD-KX2-1"
                 SCN10A = (26),
                 iNeuron = c(1),
                 OPC = c(23), 
                 NCC = c(28),
                 Pit = c(19), # "POMC", "GH1", "PRL", "TSHB", "LHB", "FSHB"
                 VLMC = c(7,24), # BMP5
                 Peri = c(30), # PDGFRB
                 EC = c(22), # VWF
                 MG  = c(29)
)

obj$ann3 <- NA_character_
map3 <- make_cluster_map(ann3_map)
obj@meta.data$ann3 <- map3[as.character(obj$seurat_clusters)]

Idents(obj) = "sub.cluster"
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_3")
obj$ann3[tany] <- "Tany" # RAX, FGF10
tany <- WhichCells(obj, idents = "8_1")
obj$ann3[tany] <- "Astro" # AGT, AQP4

#cellvio(obj, c("MOG","MBP","BCAS1","PDGFRA","OD-LIG1"), group.by = "sub.cluster", stack = T, pt.size = 0.1)
#cellvio(obj, c("TBX3","PITX2","SIM1","OD-TX2","LD-KX2-1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", stack = T, pt.size = 0.1)
#celldot(obj, c("MOG","MBP","BCAS1","PDGFRA","OD-LIG1"), group.by = "sub.cluster", style = "bw", txtsize = 8)
#hista <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(0), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("HDC"), expr.thresh = 0.1) # histaminergic
tbx3 <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(1), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("TBX3","PITX2","SIM1","OD-TX2","LD-KX2-1"), expr.thresh = 1.5)
kiss1 <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(1), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("KISS1"), expr.thresh = 1)
agrp <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(1), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("AGRP"), expr.thresh = 1)
pomc <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(1), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("POMC"), expr.thresh = 2)
npy <- cellpick(obj, clusters = c(6,9), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes =  c("LD-PY"), expr.thresh = 2) 
ol = cellpick(obj, clusters = c(23), cluster.col = "seurat_clusters", pos.genes = c("MOG","MBP","BCAS1"), expr.thresh = 2)

obj$ann3[tbx3] = "TBX3"
obj$ann3[kiss1] = "KISS1"
obj$ann3[agrp] = "AGRP"
obj$ann3[npy] = "LD-PY"
obj$ann3[pomc] = "POMC"
obj$ann3[ol] = "OD-L"


# Developmentally ordered annotation including your specific neurons
ann3_order <- c(
  # Radial glia / progenitors
  "RGC1", "RGC2", "tRGC", "dRGC", "IPC",

  # Early neurons / general
  "TBR1","RNF220","ERBB4","TBX20","VWC2L","SYT10","SLC5A7",
  "RELN","GBX1","STRIP2","SIM1","TTC6","OD-TX2","OD-NECUT2",
  "LD-KX2-1","SCN10A","iNeuron","TBX3",

  # Hypothalamic neuron subclasses
  "KISS1", "AGRP", "LD-PY", "POMC",

  # Glial lineage
  "TSC","Ependy","Tany","Astro","OD-PC","OD-L",

  # Specialized non-neural / mesenchyme
  "Myog","Cartl","LD-CC","VLMC","Peri","EC","MG",

  # Pituitary
  "Pit"
)

# Apply as factor
obj$ann3 <- factor(obj$ann3, levels = ann3_order)


cellmap(obj, group.by = "ann3", label = T, pt.size = 0.5)

```

## Neurons

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=10}

sub = get_subset(sobj = obj, group.by = "ann1", idents = "LD-euron")
cellmap(sub, group.by = "ann3")
sub <- genefilter(sub)
markers <- cellmarker(sub,  group.by = "ann3", only.pos = T, logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.25)
write.table(markers, file.path(outdir, "data/neuron_markers.tsv"), sep = "\t", row.names = F, quote = F)
obj@misc$neuron_markers <- markers
markers <- read.delim(file.path(outdir, "data/neuron_markers.tsv"))
top <- markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC)
p = celldot(sub, features = rev(top$gene), flip = T, group.by = "ann3", txtsize = 10, x.ang = 45, title = "LD-eurons", th.cols = "RdYlBu", rev.th.cols = T) 
p
savefig(p, filename = file.path(outdir, "plots/neuron_markers"),  width = 6, height = 10, format = "png")

```




# Add metadata

```{r}

obj@meta.data <- obj@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sample = case_when(
      BulkSample == "S1-PCW7" ~ "S1",
      BulkSample == "S2-PCW8" ~ "S2",
      BulkSample == "S5-PCW10" ~ "S3",
      BulkSample == "S4-PCW10.5" ~ "S4",
      BulkSample == "S6-PCW12" ~ "S5",
      BulkSample == "S7-PCW12" ~ "S6",
      BulkSample == "S8-PCW12" ~ "S7"
    ),
    status = case_when(
      BulkSample == "S1-PCW7" ~ "S1-PCW7-LD",
      BulkSample == "S2-PCW8" ~ "S2-PCW8-LD",
      BulkSample == "S5-PCW10" ~ "S3-PCW10-LD",
      BulkSample == "S4-PCW10.5" ~ "S4-PCW10.5-OD",
      BulkSample == "S6-PCW12" ~ "S5-PCW12-OD",
      BulkSample == "S7-PCW12" ~ "S6-PCW12-LD",
      BulkSample == "S8-PCW12" ~ "S7-PCW12-LD"
    ),
    stage = case_when(
      BulkSample %in% c("S1-PCW7") ~ "PCW7",
      BulkSample %in% c("S2-PCW8") ~ "PCW8",
      BulkSample %in% c("S5-PCW10","S4-PCW10.5") ~ "PCW10",
      BulkSample %in% c("S6-PCW12","S7-PCW12","S8-PCW12") ~ "PCW12"
    ),
    bmi = case_when(
      BulkSample == "S1-PCW7" ~ "LD7",
      BulkSample == "S2-PCW8" ~ "LD8",
      BulkSample == "S5-PCW10" ~ "LD10",
      BulkSample == "S4-PCW10.5" ~ "OD10.5",
      BulkSample == "S6-PCW12" ~ "OD12",
      BulkSample %in% c("S7-PCW12","S8-PCW12") ~ "LD12"
    ),
    group = case_when(
      BulkSample %in% c("S1-PCW7","S2-PCW8") ~ "LD7-8",
      BulkSample %in% c("S5-PCW10","S7-PCW12","S8-PCW12") ~ "LD10-12",
      BulkSample %in% c("S4-PCW10.5","S6-PCW12") ~ "OD10-12"
    ),
    cond = case_when(
      BulkSample %in% c("S1-PCW7","S2-PCW8","S5-PCW10","S7-PCW12","S8-PCW12") ~ "LD",
      BulkSample %in% c("S4-PCW10.5","S6-PCW12") ~ "OD"
    ),
    sex = case_when(
      BulkSample %in% c("S1-PCW7","S4-PCW10.5","S6-PCW12","S8-PCW12") ~ "M",
      BulkSample %in% c("S2-PCW8","S5-PCW10","S7-PCW12") ~ "F"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sample = factor(sample, levels = c("S1","S2","S3","S4","S5","S6","S7")),
    status = factor(status, levels = c("S1-PCW7-LD","S2-PCW8-LD","S3-PCW10-LD","S4-PCW10.5-OD","S5-PCW12-OD","S6-PCW12-LD","S7-PCW12-LD")),
    stage  = factor(stage, levels = c("PCW7","PCW8","PCW10","PCW12")),
    bmi    = factor(bmi, levels = c("LD7","LD8","LD10","OD10.5","OD12","LD12")),
    group  = factor(group, levels = c("LD7-8","LD10-12","OD10-12")),
    cond   = factor(cond, levels = c("LD","OD")),
    sex    = factor(sex, levels = c("M","F"))
  )


```

# Save data

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=18}

saveRDS(obj, file.path(outdir, "data/fh.rds"))

```



## Session info

```{r}

sessionInfo()

```
